metadata.description: A11 — Continuous mention monitor. Polls configured sources (HN, Reddit, Google Alerts, Discord) every hour; Twitter off by default (PAID). Scores each mention by author reach + CRM match + keyword density. score<4 silent, 4-7 daily digest, >=7 immediate founder_action. Negative-sentiment cluster >=3 in 1h triggers crisis_comms_draft (B6). Uses refactored oncall_agent handler registry (A11.r1). Internal-signal proxy via tickets (A11.r2) until Z6 product event stream ships.
metadata.product_scoping: product_id required; all mentions rows scoped per-product
metadata.twitter_note: Twitter source is PAID and OFF by default. Set MENTION_TWITTER_ENABLED=1 in .env to opt in (founder consent required).

phases.description: Poll all enabled mention sources for the product.

steps.title: Poll Hacker News mentions
steps.description: Algolia HN Search API — free, no key needed. Searches recent stories + comments for product_name.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: mention_polls/hn. No network key required.

steps.title: Poll Reddit mentions
steps.description: PRAW search — free, rate-limited. Requires REDDIT_CLIENT_ID + REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET in .env. Skips silently if not configured.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: mention_polls/reddit. Reads REDDIT_CLIENT_ID + REDDIT_CLIENT_SECRET from env.

steps.title: Poll Google Alerts RSS
steps.description: Google Alerts RSS feed — free, no key needed. Searches for quoted product_name mentions across the web.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: mention_polls/google. Free RSS; no API key.

steps.title: Poll Discord channels
steps.description: Discord bot — reads configured channel_ids for product mentions. Skips silently if DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN not set or channel_ids empty.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: mention_polls/discord. Reads DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN from env.

steps.title: Poll internal signal (tickets proxy)
steps.description: A11.r2 — watches tickets.sentiment='negative' + confidence<0.5 as a proxy mention source until Z6 product event stream ships. Clusters >=3 in 1h trigger crisis_comms_draft.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: internal_signal_poll. Reads tickets table directly; no external network.

phases.description: Surface daily digest of score 4-7 mentions to founder (if any pending).

steps.title: Surface daily mention digest
steps.description: Reads mentions with signal_score between 4 and 6 (inclusive) that have not yet been acted on. Bundles into a single Telegram message for the founder. Only runs if there are pending digest-tier mentions.
steps.tools_hint: mr_roboto verb: notify_user with mention_digest template.
